articles.title: 哈兰德表示挪威进军世界杯的机会“仍然很低......
articles.summary: 挪威前锋埃尔林·哈兰德表示，他的球队赢得世界杯的机会“非常低”，并且在迈阿密举行的世界杯四分之一决赛之前，所有压力都集中在英格兰队身上。
articles.originalTitle: Haaland says Norway's WC chances 'still really low...
articles.originalSummary: Norway striker Erling Haaland has said that his side's chances of winning the World Cup are "really low" -- and that all the pressure is on England ahead of their World Cup quarterfinal in Miami.

articles.originalSummary: England fullback Jarell Quansah has been suspended for two matches after receiving a red card in his side's World Cup round-of-16 win over Mexico.
